stemHtml: A Multi Engine Jet Aircraft with a passenger capacity of 4 and a random mass of less than 5 700 kg belongs to which performance class?

options.b: Performance class C, because this is a special categorisation for jets with fewer than 9 passenger seats.
options.c: Performance class A, because all jet aircraft belong to this performance class.
options.d: Performance class B, because it has a passenger seating capacity below 9 and MTOM below 5 700 kg.
